eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Maryland; at 9:20 AM on JUN 3, 2026 Effective until 10:20 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Test. This is a statewide Required Weekly Test of the Emergency Alert System originating from the Maryland Department of Emergency Management. This is only a test.
